config.notes: Both directions trained from cross-encoder/nli-deberta-v3-base (same backbone as S4) with a freshly initialized 2-way head. Train sampling balanced across domain x label strata so all domains are represented at every N. Test sets are proportional (HaluBench fixed 8000 from earlier curve; RAGTruth official 2700 test split). Zero-shot row is the untrained binary head and is shown only as a chance-level reference; it is NOT comparable to S4-zero-shot from earlier experiments.
